figure.title: UALink System Node Architecture
figure.purpose: Illustrates the internal components and connectivity of a typical UALink System Node.

technical_summary: The System Node contains 4 Accelerators (Acc), 2 CPUs, a Network Interface Card (NIC), and a Baseboard Management Controller (BMC).
The Accelerators are grouped and connected to the CPUs.
The NIC and BMC provide external networking and management interfaces, connected to the CPUs.

components.name: Accelerators (Acc)
components.description: Compute resources connected to the CPUs.

components.name: BMC
components.description: Baseboard Management Controller for out-of-band management.

critical_facts: A standard UALink System Node encapsulates compute (CPUs, Accs) and management (BMC, NIC) domains.
